commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a yield-aware completion-required media-wait predicate, routes inactive isolated cron generated-media completions through the requester agent before direct media fallback, and adds focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +124. Total +144 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can classify sessions_yield as an intentional abort and then enter the completion-required waiter with the already-aborted run signal. I did not run a live isolated cron/provider reproduction in this read-only review.
